IRGC warns it may cut undersea internet cables in Persian Gulf: What it may mean
description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has warned that undersea data cables in the Strait of Hormuz are highly vulnerable, potentially causing severe internet outages across the Persian Gulf. These vital digital arteries carry a significant portion of regional internet traffic and support major AI infrastructure, impacting global communication, finance, and cloud services.

title: After $6.25bn 'gift' to 'Trump Accounts', Michael & Susan Dell donate $750m
description: Michael and Susan Dell have pledged $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This significant donation will focus on integrating AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education. The project, expected to open by 2030, aims to enhance Austin's healthcare capabilities and advance medical innovation.

title: Russini’s husband faces scrutiny over claims he knew of alleged Vrabel affair
description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and the former New York Times’ reporter and NFL insider, Dianna Russini, continue to dominate headlines as their alleged affair rumors swirl. As Dianna Russini has stepped down from her role at The Athletic, new allegations have been made about her marital life that she has always tried to keep out of the spotlight.

title: Final Instagram post of Brazilian triathlete Mara Araujo resurfaces after death
description: Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo died during the swimming leg of the Ironman Texas triathlon on April 19, 2026. Her last Instagram post, shared hours earlier, has gone viral after her death. Reports from Chosun.com and Yahoo confirm she went missing during the swim. A close friend revealed she was unwell before the race but still chose to compete.
